motifs: a detail of old fibre-cement sheeting and aged building fabric
a caution barrier and hazard tape across a work area
a respirator and disposable coveralls set aside, unused
a hazard-assessment clipboard resting on a step ladder
briefs.palette: caution amber-yellow and hazard black with neutral concrete greys
briefs.mood: cautious, WHS-led, awareness; recognise and do not disturb
